creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
Using jed-0.99.15.

If VISUAL=jed, then send-pr will abort immediately after the editor is exited.

Jed's exit sequence is ^X^C. Somehow it seems like the ^C is getting sent to
send-pr. 

Note: use VISUAL='xemacs -nw', for example, and it works; Xemacs has the same
exit sequence (ending in ^C) that jed does.

Fix: 

No clue right now. Don't use jed to edit PRs.
How-To-Repeat: 
VISUAL=jed send-pr
[edit your PR. exit jed. watch your PR get deleted.]
